phases.title: Backend functions
phases.description:
Goal: Port all 12 backend serverless functions from the imported source.

Source → target mapping:
| source path | target path | class | transform notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| /imported-source/backend/allotments/getAllotments.ts | /backend/allotments/getAllotments.ts | A | byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/allotments/getAvailability.ts | /backend/allotments/getAvailability.ts | A | byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/bookings/cancelBooking.ts | /backend/bookings/cancelBooking.ts | A | byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/bookings/createBooking.ts | /backend/bookings/createBooking.ts | A | byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/bookings/getBookings.ts | /backend/bookings/getBookings.ts | A | byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/bookings/updateBooking.ts | /backend/bookings/updateBooking.ts | A | byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/changes/getChanges.ts | /backend/changes/getChanges.ts | A | byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/hotels/addHotel.ts | /backend/hotels/addHotel.ts | A | byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/reports/getChangesReport.ts | /backend/reports/getChangesReport.ts | A | byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/reports/getFullReport.ts | /backend/reports/getFullReport.ts | A | byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/reports/getPayments.ts | /backend/reports/getPayments.ts | A | byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/backend/reports/getRoomingList.ts | /backend/reports/getRoomingList.ts | A | byte-identical copy |

All files are Class A (byte-identical copies). Use copy_file tool for each.

Row ordering: copy all files independently — no inter-dependencies.
Carve-out: Do not create, modify, or delete any file whose target path is not in the row list above.
phases.notes: All 12 backend serverless functions copied byte-identical: allotments (2), bookings (4), changes (1), hotels (1), reports (4).

phases.title: Pages and App routing
phases.description:
Goal: Port the two page components and wire up the App router.

Source → target mapping:
| source path | target path | class | transform notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/ReportsTab.tsx | /frontend/pages/ReportsTab.tsx | A | byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/Dashboard.tsx | /frontend/pages/Dashboard.tsx | A | byte-identical copy |
| /imported-source/frontend/App.tsx | /frontend/App.tsx | B | Add import for global.css: change `import './styles/global.css'` (path stays the same, already correct relative to /frontend/App.tsx) |

For App.tsx: copy /imported-source/frontend/App.tsx first, then verify the global.css import path is correct (`'./styles/global.css'`). The source already has this import so no edit is needed — Class A in practice.

Row ordering: ReportsTab.tsx first, then Dashboard.tsx (imports ReportsTab), then App.tsx last.
Carve-out: Do not create, modify, or delete any file whose target path is not in the row list above.
phases.notes: All three files copied byte-identical. App.tsx routes / → Dashboard, * → redirect. global.css import at './styles/global.css' confirmed correct.

phases.title: Review the imported app for gaps and queue fix phases
phases.description:
Review the completed target app against the imported source under
/imported-source/. Identify import gaps, but do not fix them inline in this
phase.

Compare the source and target coverage for:
- routes & pages
- components
- backend functions
- serverless / edge / custom server routes
- dependencies
- styling & theming
- auth / env / assumptions

Additionally:
- run the project's build/typecheck to check for any remaining errors
- check the /plans/import-build-plan.json for any remaining deferred gaps that did not get addressed in later phases

For material gaps / build errors, append focused fix phase(s) with
`extend_phased_build_plan`. Each appended phase should be self-contained and small
enough for one context window.

Keep any comparison notes private or in tool arguments only; do not narrate the full
audit to the user. Do not re-queue gaps already covered by existing phases.

When all identified gaps have been queued, call `complete_build_phase`. If no gaps
are found, call `complete_build_phase` without appending phases.
phases.notes: Single gap found: React.ReactNode used without importing React in Dashboard.tsx, ManualBookingModal.tsx, AddHotelModal.tsx, BillingDetailsModal.tsx, ChangeBookingModal.tsx. Fix: add `type ReactNode` to each file's react import and replace React.ReactNode with ReactNode. All other axes (routes, backend functions, dependencies, CSS, auth) are complete and correct.

phases.title: Fix React.ReactNode TypeScript errors in ported components
phases.description:
Goal: Fix `Cannot find namespace 'React'` TypeScript errors caused by `React.ReactNode` being used without importing `React` in five byte-identical-copied files.

Source → target mapping rows (all Class B — edit existing files):
| source path | target path | class | transform notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/Dashboard.tsx | /frontend/pages/Dashboard.tsx | B | Add `import type { ReactNode } from 'react'` to the existing react import line (change `import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react"` → `import { useEffect, useMemo, useState, type ReactNode } from "react"`), then replace the single instance of `React.ReactNode` (line ~80, in KpiCardProps `icon` field) with `ReactNode` |
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/ui/ManualBookingModal.tsx | /frontend/pages/ui/ManualBookingModal.tsx | B | Add `type ReactNode` to the existing react import (change `import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from "react"` → `import { useState, useEffect, useMemo, type ReactNode } from "react"`), then replace `React.ReactNode` in the Field component props with `ReactNode` |
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/ui/AddHotelModal.tsx | /frontend/pages/ui/AddHotelModal.tsx | B | Add `type ReactNode` to the existing react import (change `import { useState } from "react"` → `import { useState, type ReactNode } from "react"`), then replace `React.ReactNode` in FieldWrap props with `ReactNode` |
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/ui/BillingDetailsModal.tsx | /frontend/pages/ui/BillingDetailsModal.tsx | B | No existing react import — add `import type { ReactNode } from 'react'` as the first line, then replace `React.ReactNode` in SectionTitle props with `ReactNode` |
| /imported-source/frontend/pages/ui/ChangeBookingModal.tsx | /frontend/pages/ui/ChangeBookingModal.tsx | B | Add `type ReactNode` to the existing react import (change `import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from "react"` → `import { useState, useEffect, useMemo, type ReactNode } from "react"`), then replace `React.ReactNode` in Field props with `ReactNode` |

No backend functions to author. No dependency delta.

Row ordering: all five files are independent — edit them in any order, but use `batch` to parallelise.
Carve-out: Do not create, modify, or delete any file whose target path is not in the row list above.
Tool selection rule: Class B → edit file applying the row's transform notes (do NOT copy first — the target files already exist).
phases.notes: BillingDetailsModal.tsx had no pre-existing React import — the replace-all edit landed first, then a second edit prepended `import type { ReactNode } from 'react'` as the first line. All five files now compile cleanly.
